name: GTM-GuiaCulinaria-Container
description: Container completo para rastreamento TOTAL do Guia Culinária

tag.name: Webhook para Sheets - Dados de Rastreamento
tag.html:
<script>
(function() {
  // Captura eventos e envia para Google Sheets via webhook
  var SHEETS_WEBAPP_URL = 'COLOQUE_AQUI_O_URL_DO_GOOGLE_APPS_SCRIPT';
  
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  
  // Listener para clicks
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var target = e.target.closest('a');
    if (!target) return;
    
    var href = target.href || '';
    var text = target.innerText || '';
    
    if (href.includes('amzn.to') || href.includes('amazon.com.br')) {
      window.dataLayer.push({
        event: 'afiliado_click',
        eventCategory: 'Afiliado Amazon',
        eventAction: 'Click',
        eventLabel: text,
        linkUrl: href,
        pageUrl: window.location.href,
        pageTitle: document.title
      });
    } else if (href.includes('mercadolivre')) {
      window.dataLayer.push({
        event: 'afiliado_click',
        eventCategory: 'Afiliado Mercado Livre',
        eventAction: 'Click',
        eventLabel: text,
        linkUrl: href,
        pageUrl: window.location.href,
        pageTitle: document.title
      });
    } else if (href.includes('/go/')) {
      window.dataLayer.push({
        event: 'shortlink_click',
        eventCategory: 'Shortlink interno',
        eventAction: 'Click',
        eventLabel: href,
        pageUrl: window.location.href
      });
    }
  });
  
  // Listener para scroll
  var scrollMarks = {25: false, 50: false, 75: false, 100: false};
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    var h = document.documentElement;
    var scrollTop = h.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop;
    var scrollHeight = h.scrollHeight - h.clientHeight;
    var scrolled = (scrollTop / scrollHeight) * 100;
    
    if (scrolled >= 25 && !scrollMarks[25]) {
      scrollMarks[25] = true;
      window.dataLayer.push({event: 'scroll_depth', depth: 25, page: window.location.pathname});
    }
    if (scrolled >= 50 && !scrollMarks[50]) {
      scrollMarks[50] = true;
      window.dataLayer.push({event: 'scroll_depth', depth: 50, page: window.location.pathname});
    }
    if (scrolled >= 75 && !scrollMarks[75]) {
      scrollMarks[75] = true;
      window.dataLayer.push({event: 'scroll_depth', depth: 75, page: window.location.pathname});
    }
    if (scrolled >= 95 && !scrollMarks[100]) {
      scrollMarks[100] = true;
      window.dataLayer.push({event: 'scroll_depth', depth: 100, page: window.location.pathname});
    }
  });
  
  // Envia para Google Sheets a cada evento
  window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
    if (e.data && e.data.gtmEvent) {
      fetch(SHEETS_WEBAPP_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        mode: 'no-cors',
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: JSON.stringify(e.data)
      });
    }
  });
})();
</script>
